task_completion.description: Verify the agent used the API to update the server name to 'CORP-WH07-NVR01'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing a curl command, python script, or similar API client making a PUT/PATCH/POST request to the Nx Witness API to change the server name to 'CORP-WH07-NVR01', or a successful API response confirming the change.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent used the API to update the server location metadata to 'Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing an API request (e.g., curl or python) updating the server's location metadata to 'Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B', or a successful API response confirming the metadata update.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON architecture documentation file was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'ls /home/ga/Documents/' including 'vms_architecture.json', or the file open in a text editor at that specific path.

task_completion.description: Verify the JSON file contains the correct schema, system info, updated server details, and attached cameras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'cat /home/ga/Documents/vms_architecture.json' or an editor showing the file contents. It must be valid JSON containing 'CORP-WH07-NVR01', 'Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B', 'GymAnythingVMS', and the list of cameras.

task_completion.description: Verify the human-readable summary text file was created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing 'ls /home/ga/Documents/' including 'vms_architecture_summary.txt', or the file open in a text editor at that specific path.

task_completion.description: Verify the text summary file contains human-readable architecture information including the updated server details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'cat /home/ga/Documents/vms_architecture_summary.txt' or an editor showing the file contents. It must be readable text (not JSON) mentioning the new server name 'CORP-WH07-NVR01' and its location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the API to update the server, rather than the Nx Witness desktop GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (curl, python, etc.) making HTTP requests to localhost:7001/rest/v1/. The agent should not be clicking through the Nx Witness desktop client to rename the server.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually queried the API to retrieve the system and camera information before writing the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for GET requests to /rest/v1/devices or /rest/v1/servers in the terminal history or script contents, proving the agent didn't just hallucinate or hardcode the JSON output based on assumptions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent wrote the scripts or commands themselves rather than downloading a pre-made solution.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that there are no 'wget' or 'curl' commands downloading complete python scripts or JSON files from external, unauthorized URLs.
